name: Track
comments: 2 or 3 character Equibase Track Code

name: Date
comments: Format: mm/dd/yyyy; Example: 04/02/2005 = April 2, 2005

name: Breed of Race
comments: TB = Thoroughbred; QH = Quarter Horse; AR = Arabian; MX = Mixed Breed

name: Distance
comments: Distance in Furlongs; Format: #.##; Example: 6.50 = 6 1/2 furlongs; 1 mile 40 yards = 8.18; 2 miles 40 yards = 16.18; 1 mile 70 yards = 8.32; 2 miles 70 yards = 16.32

name: About Distance Indicator
comments: Y = About Distance; Otherwise Blank

name: Surface
comments: D = Dirt; T = Turf; P = PolyTrack

name: Off Turf Indicator
comments: Y = Race was moved off the turf; Otherwise Blank

name: Course Type
comments: M = Main Course; I = Inner Course; O = Outer Course; H = Hurdles Course; S = Steeplechase Course; Tracks with Inner Courses include Aqu, Bel, Sar, Wo and Cnl; Tracks with Outer Courses include Cnl; Except for Cnl, the Outer Courses for all other tracks are listed as 'M' for Main

name: Race Type
comments: ALW = Allowance; AOC = Allowance Optional Claiming; CLH = Claiming Handicap; CLM = Claiming; CST = Claiming Stake; HCP = Handicap; MAT = Match; MCL = Maiden Claiming; MOC = Maiden Optional Claiming; MST = Maiden Stakes; MSW = Maiden Special Weight; OCH = Optional Claiming Handicap; OCL = Optional Claiming; OCS = Optional Claiming Stakes; SHP = Starter Handicap; SST = Starter Stakes; STK = Stakes; STR = Starter Allowance; TRL = Trial

name: Sex Restriction
comments: A = Colts & Geldings; B = Fillies & Mares; C = Colts; D = Colts & Fillies; E = Fillies & Geldings; F = Fillies; G = Geldings; H = Horses; I = Colts, Geldings & Horses; J = Geldings & Horses; M = Mares; R = Ridglings; Blank = No Sex Restrictions

name: Age Restriction
comments: 02 = 2 year olds; 03 = 3 year olds; 04 = 4 year olds; 05 = 5 year olds; 06 = 6 year olds; 07 = 7 year olds; 08 = 8 year olds; 09 = 9 year olds; 23 = 2 & 3 year olds; 24 = 2, 3 & 4 year olds; 2U = 2 year olds & up; 34 = 3 & 4 year olds; 35 = 3, 4 & 5 year olds; 36 = 3, 4, 5 & 6 year olds; 3U = 3 year olds & up; 45 = 4 & 5 year olds; 46 = 4, 5 & 6 year olds; 47 = 4, 5, 6 & 7 year olds; 4U = 4 year olds & up; 56 = 5 & 6 year olds; 57 = 5, 6 & 7 year olds; 58 = 5, 6, 7 & 8 year olds; 59 = 5, 6, 7, 8 & 9 year olds; 5U = 5 year olds & up; 67 = 6 & 7 year olds; 68 = 6, 7 & 8 year olds; 69 = 6, 7, 8 & 9 year olds; 6U = 6 year olds & up; 78 = 7 & 8 year olds; 79 = 7, 8 & 9 year olds; 7U = 7 year olds & up; 8U = 8 year olds & up; 9U = 9 year olds & up; Blank = No Age Restriction

name: Statebred Restriction
comments: Y = Restricted to Statebred horses; Otherwise Blank

name: Purse
comments: In US Dollars

name: Maximum Claiming Price
comments: In US Dollars - Maximum Claiming Price a horse can be entered for; In Starter Races, the claiming price eligibility requirement

name: Minimum Claiming Price
comments: In US Dollars - Minimum Claiming Price a horse can be entered for

name: Grade
comments: 1 = Grade 1; 2 = Grade 2; 3 = Grade 3; Otherwise Blank

name: Number of Starters
comments: Number of horses that started the race

name: Track Condition
comments: FST = Fast; WF = Wet-Fast; GD = Good; SLY = Sloppy; MY = Muddy; SL = Slow; HY = Heavy; FR = Frozen; HD = Hard; FM = Firm; YL = Yielding; SF = Soft

name: Weather
comments: A = Hot; B = Fine; C = Clear; E = Overcast; F = Foggy; H = Hazy; L = Cloudy; O = Showery; R = Rainy; S = Snowing; T = Stormy; W = Windy

name: Post Time
comments: Actual time the race went off; Format: h:mm; Example: 2:23; 12:20

name: Temp Rail Distance
comments: Distance out of Temporary Rail from Inside Rail; Otherwise Blank

name: Chute Start Indicator
comments: Y = Race was started from a chute; Otherwise Blank

name: Track Sealed Indicator
comments: Y = Track was Sealed; Otherwise Blank

name: Race F1 Time
comments: In Seconds; Format: sss.ttt; Example: 23.430; See Note 1 for F1 Distances

name: Race F2 Time
comments: In Seconds; Format: sss.ttt; Example: 46.430; See Note 1 for F2 Distances

name: Race F3 Time
comments: In Seconds; Format: sss.ttt; Example: 70.430; See Note 1 for F3 Distances

name: Race F4 Time
comments: In Seconds; Format: sss.ttt; Example: 95.430; See Note 1 for F4 Distances

name: Race F5 Time
comments: In Seconds; Format: sss.ttt; Example: 115.430; See Note 1 for F5 Distances

name: Race Winning Time
comments: In Seconds; Format: sss.ttt; Example: 72.430

name: WPS Combined Pool
comments: Combined Win, Place and Show Pool

name: Run Up Distance
comments: In Feet; Distance from Starting Gate to Starting Timer; Blank = Unknown or Unavailable

name: Downhill Turf Indicator
comments: Y = Race was run on Santa Anita Downhill Turf Course; Otherwise Blank

name: Number of turns in race
comments: Rounded to nearest integer; 0 is valid; Blank = unavailable; 1 turn = approx 180 degrees; 1/2 turn = approx 90 degrees; 1.5 rounded to 2; 1.25 rounded to 1

name: Number of turns in race (decimal)
comments: Decimal version; 0 is valid; Blank = unavailable; Fractions from chute starts; Work in progress field

name: Horse Sex
comments: F = Filly; M = Mare; C = Colt; H = Horse; G = Gelding; R = Ridgling

name: Medication
comments: L = Lasix; B = Bute; A = Adjunct Bleeder Medication

name: Equipment
comments: Blank = No equipment; 2 = Screens; 3 = Shields; A = Aluminum Pads; B = Blinkers; C = Mud Calks; F = Front Wraps; G = Goggles; H = Hood; I = Cornell Collar; J = Cornell Collar Off; K = Flipping halter; L = Bar Shoes; N = No whip; O = Blinkers off; P = Aluminum Pad; Q = Nasal Strip off; R = Bar Shoe; S = Nasal Strip; V = Cheek Piece; W = No Hind Shoes; X = Cheek Piece Off; Y = No shoes; Z = Tongue Tie

name: Claiming Price
comments: Claiming Price horse was entered for

name: Earnings
comments: Money earned by horse in this race

name: Coupled Type
comments: Horses marked 'a' are coupled; 'b' are coupled; Blank if uncoupled

name: Favorite Indicator
comments: Y = Final Tote Favorite; Otherwise Blank

name: Non-Betting Indicator
comments: Y = No Betting on this horse; Otherwise Blank

name: Win Mutuel Paid
comments: In US Dollars; Coupled horses share mutuel

name: Place Mutuel Paid
comments: In US Dollars; Coupled horses share mutuel

name: Show Mutuel Paid
comments: In US Dollars; Coupled horses share mutuel

name: Position at Start Call
comments: See Note 2

name: Position at Call 1
comments: See Note 2; Horses who did not finish are placed last

name: Position at Call 2
comments: See Note 2; Horses who did not finish are placed last

name: Position at Call 3
comments: See Note 2; Horses who did not finish are placed last

name: Position at Call 4
comments: See Note 2; Horses who did not finish are placed last

name: Position at Call 5
comments: See Note 2; Horses who did not finish are placed last

name: Position at Finish
comments: See Note 2; Horses who did not finish are placed last

name: Official Finish Position
comments: See Note 2; Horses who did not finish are placed last

name: Call 1 Lengths Behind
comments: See Note 2; 99.99 = Did Not Finish

name: Call 2 Lengths Behind
comments: See Note 2; 99.99 = Did Not Finish

name: Call 3 Lengths Behind
comments: See Note 2; 99.99 = Did Not Finish

name: Call 4 Lengths Behind
comments: See Note 2; 99.99 = Did Not Finish

name: Stretch Call Lengths Behind
comments: See Note 2; 99.99 = Did Not Finish

name: Finish Lengths Behind
comments: See Note 2; 99.99 = Did Not Finish

name: Apprentice Wgt Allowance
comments: 5 lbs = Apprentice Type 1; 7 lbs = Apprentice Type 2; 10 lbs = Apprentice Type 3; Otherwise Blank

name: Claimed Indicator
comments: Y = Horse was claimed; Otherwise Blank

name: Scratch Indicator
comments: Y = Scratched; Otherwise Blank

name: Reason for Scratch
comments: A = Also Eligible; E = Early; G = Gate; I = RegVet - Injured; J = PrivVet - Injured; K = Stakes Scratch; L = RegVet - Illness; M = Main Track Only; N = PrivVet - Unsound; O = Off Turf; P = Reason Unavailable; R = Re-entered; S = Stewards; T = Trainer; U = RegVet - Unsound; V = Veterinarian; Y = Part of Entry; Z = PrivVet - Illness; Blank = Unknown

name: Last Race Track
comments: 2 or 3 character Equibase Track Code

name: Last Race Date
comments: Format: mm/dd/yyyy; Example: 04/17/2005

name: Last Race Finish Position
comments: Original Finish Position

name: Foaling Date
comments: Format: mm/dd/yyyy; Example: 04/17/2005

name: Foaling Area
comments: State/province for USA/Canada; Country otherwise

name: Horse Weight
comments: Weight of horse; 1 = difficulties weighing

name: Number of Claims Submitted
comments: Number of claims submitted

name: Void Indicator
comments: Y = Claim was voided; Otherwise Blank

name: Void Reason
comments: A = Administrative; D = Deceased; O = Other; P = Positive Test; V = Vet; Otherwise Blank

name: Color
comments: Color of Horse

name: Jockey ID
comments: Equibase assigned Jockey ID

name: Trainer ID
comments: Equibase assigned Trainer ID

name: #1 Wager Type
comments: $ = Super Bet; 0 = Choose 6; 1 = Roulette; 13 = 123racing; 18 = Pick 18; 2 = Two in the Money; 3 = Pick 3; 4 = Pick 4; 4J = Pick 4 Jackpot; 5 = Pick 5; 5J = Pick 5 Jackpot; 6 = Pick 6; 6J = Pick 6 Jackpot; 7 = Pick 7; 7J = Pick 7 Jackpot; 8 = Countdown; 9 = Pick 9; 9J = Pick 9 Jackpot; A = Triactor; B = Super Tri; BQ = Bracket Quinella; C = Classix; D = Daily Double; E = Exacta; F = Perfecta; G = Perfector; H = Head2Head; HE = Halfway Exacta; HW = Halfway Win; I = Pick 10; ID = Instant Daily Double; J = Exactor; K = Win 4; L = Place Pick All; L8 = Place Pick 8; M = Consolation Pick 3; N = Future Wager; O = Omni; OU = Over/Under; P = Jockey Challenge; P5 = Place Pick 5; P6 = Place Pick 6; P8 = Pick 8; P9 = Place Pick 9; Q = Quinella; R = Triple; S = Superfecta; S5 = Super High Five; SQ = Show Quinella; T = Trifecta; U = Tri Super; V = Odd or Even; W = Twin Trifecta; X = Grand Slam; X5 = X-5 Super Hi-5; Y = Straight Flush; Z = Consolation Double; Z5 = Z-5 Super Hi-5

name: #1 Wager Unit
comments: Unit Bet for specified Payout

name: #1 Number Right
comments: Number right in multi-part bets

name: #1 Wager Payout
comments: Payout in US Dollars

name: #1 Winning Pgm Numbers
comments: Winning Program Numbers

name: #1 Total Pool
comments: Total Pool for this Wager Type
